name: Residential Roofing
description: Residential roofing is the process of installing, repairing, and maintaining the roofs of residential homes. It involves various materials and techniques to ensure the roof is durable, weather-resistant, and aesthetically pleasing.

name: Commercial Roofing
description: Commercial roofing involves the installation, repair, and maintenance of roofs on commercial buildings, such as offices, warehouses, retail stores, and industrial facilities.

name: Copper Roofing
description: Choosing JDM Roofing for your copper roofing needs means opting for unparalleled craftsmanship and exceptional customer service. Our experienced professionals use the finest materials and latest techniques.

name: Roof Maintenance
description: Roof maintenance involves regular inspections, cleaning, and repairs to ensure the longevity and functionality of a roof. Proper maintenance helps prevent minor issues from becoming major problems.

name: Roof Coatings
description: Roof coatings are protective layers applied to the surface of a roof to enhance its durability, extend its lifespan, and improve its performance against environmental elements.
